scripts.check: bun scripts/check-time-taxonomy.ts && bunx tsc --noEmit && bun run coverage
scripts.smoke:read: ./scripts/alpaca.sh account get >/dev/null && ./scripts/alpaca.sh position list >/dev/null && ./scripts/alpaca.sh order list --status open >/dev/null
scripts.eval: bun test tests/shared/risk.test.ts tests/orders/orders.test.ts tests/orders/order-management.test.ts tests/shared/security.test.ts tests/research/copilot.test.ts tests/portfolio/eval.test.ts tests/research/research.test.ts
